main.description: Primary orchestrator — routes tasks, manages handoffs, governance authority, memory gatekeeper

loki.description: System monitor — heartbeats, cron watchdog, connectivity probes every 30 minutes

thor.description: Reasoning and deep analysis engine — on-demand systems specialist, workflow optimization

adam.description: Documentation and knowledge base agent — writes, archives, and maintains structured docs

apollo.description: Social media analytics agent — daily metrics tracking and reporting

buddha.description: Thought leadership agent — LinkedIn content strategy and publishing

beelzebub.description: R&D lab agent — experimental Odin development and ideation

chronus.description: Content scheduler agent — optimal post timing and publishing queue

hades.description: Security auditor agent — vulnerability assessment and access review

hercules.description: Community bot agent — fan community management and engagement

hermes.description: Collaboration leads agent — opportunity discovery and outreach coordination

qin.description: Usage tracker agent — API cost monitoring and spending analytics

shiva.description: Trading bot agent — automated market execution and strategy management

tesla.description: Portfolio curator agent — AI content curation and publishing pipeline

zeus.description: Insurance analyzer agent — policy analysis and risk assessment
